_doc: Dashboard-paste-capable connectors. Plan: plans/onboarding-flip.md §B (dashboard paste flow). Read by recommend-matcher.md (mode: scan-output) and frontend DashboardPastePage. Each entry describes one connector that we can wire via a single user-pasted credential in the dashboard. The matcher uses this registry to decide which non-OAuth connectors are 'wireable' today — anything not listed here gets dropped from automation_candidates rather than emitted with a broken install_path. The frontend uses it to render the paste form (label, validation, verify probe). Add a new connector by adding a new entry here; engineering review per addition.

linear.label: Linear
linear.shapeGateHint: Linear keys start with `lin_api_`. Get one from linear.app → Settings → API → Personal API keys.

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.shapeGateHint: OpenAI keys start with `sk-` (or `sk-proj-` for project keys). Get one from platform.openai.com → API keys.

anthropic.label: Anthropic
anthropic.shapeGateHint: Anthropic keys start with `sk-ant-`. Get one from console.anthropic.com → API Keys.

stripe.label: Stripe
stripe.shapeGateHint: Stripe secret keys start with `sk_live_`, `sk_test_`, `rk_live_`, or `rk_test_`. Publishable keys (`pk_*`) are NOT secret keys — get the right one from dashboard.stripe.com → Developers → API keys.

supabase.label: Supabase
supabase.shapeGateHint: Supabase service role keys are JWTs (three dot-separated base64url segments). Get one from app.supabase.com → Project Settings → API. The service role key bypasses RLS — only paste it if you intend that scope.

planetscale.label: PlanetScale
planetscale.shapeGateHint: PlanetScale service tokens start with `pscale_tkn_`. Generate one at app.planetscale.com → Settings → Service tokens.

neon.label: Neon
neon.shapeGateHint: Neon API keys are alphanumeric. Generate one from console.neon.tech → Account settings → API keys.
